notes: Full Italian dinner menu + cocktails + wine-by-the-glass captured. Pasta dishes list two prices (half/full) — smaller in price_cents, note in price_note. Romantic Eastlake room with live piano some nights. No explicit veg/GF marks on the menu.

dishes.name: Ravanello
dishes.description: Butter lettuce, radish, pickled grape, chive, tarragon, buttermilk vinaigrette.

dishes.name: Misto
dishes.description: Mixed greens, olive, pickled red onion, chickpea, cucumber, cherry tomato, soppressata, Pecorino, white balsamic vinaigrette.

dishes.name: Burrata
dishes.description: Roasted plum, prosciutto, almond, saba, everything cracker.

dishes.name: Arancini
dishes.description: Risotto fritto, fig jam, gorgonzola dolci, artichoke, roasted pepper, pine nut, fonduta.

dishes.name: Bruschetta
dishes.description: Fromage blanc, rose honey, pistachio-sesame dukkah; green olive tapenade, Mama Lil's peppers; smoked fish, caper-dill aioli; house bread.

dishes.name: Asparagi
dishes.description: Grilled asparagus, peppadew pepper, limone vinaigrette, crouton, romesco, fried egg, Pecorino.

dishes.name: Polpo
dishes.description: Braised octopus, eggplant caponata, cannellini bean, pine nut, Calabrian chili, salsa verde.

dishes.name: Polpettine
dishes.description: Beef and pork meatballs, green olive-tomato sauce, smoked mozzarella, gremolata.

dishes.name: Pane
dishes.description: House sourdough focaccia, infused olive oil.

dishes.name: Mafaldine alla Carbonara
dishes.description: Guanciale, spring onion, sun dried tomato, egg yolk, black pepper, Pecorino.

dishes.name: Spaghetti
dishes.description: Prawn, Manila clam, Calabrian soffritto, oregano, black garlic pangrattato.

dishes.name: Rigatoni Bolognese
dishes.description: Pork and beef sugo, tomato, rosemary, mascarpone, Pecorino.

dishes.name: Risotto
dishes.description: Spring peas, pea pistou, cipollini onion, prosciutto fritto. Add braised pork shank +20.

dishes.name: Trota
dishes.description: Pan roasted trout, Manila clam, saffron brodo, fregola sarda, cipollini agrodolce, cherry tomato, Taggiasca olive, romanesco.

dishes.name: Pollo
dishes.description: Chicken confit, Parisian gnocchi, fava bean, baby carrot, zucchini, frisée, citrus jus.

dishes.name: Melanzane
dishes.description: Eggplant involtini, ricotta, basil, tomato, capellini aglio e olio.

dishes.name: Lasagna
dishes.description: Pork and beef ragù, ricotta, tomato, béchamel, Grana Padano.

dishes.name: Maiale
dishes.description: 14oz pork chop, chorizo, marble potato, peach agrodolce, peperonata, haricot vert, balsamico.

dishes.name: Torta al Fragola
dishes.description: Strawberry rhubarb puree, brown butter oat cake, toasted black pepper meringue.

dishes.name: Sciocco
dishes.description: Dark chocolate cremeux, almond cream, cocoa nib tuile, red wine cherries.

dishes.name: Affogato
dishes.description: Vanilla gelato, Cafe Umbria espresso, biscotti.

dishes.name: Biscotti
dishes.description: Assorted Italian cookies.

beverages.name: La Spinetta Il Rosé di Casanova
